$comment: Cross-language golden vectors for wilsonInterval + percentile (linear interpolation, no continuity correction). CLI test imports via JSON import attribute (Deno). Site test receives this file as __STATS_GOLDEN_VECTORS__ injected by vitest.config.ts at config-time — node:fs cannot cross the miniflare /bundle/ root at runtime. Modifications must update BOTH tests/unit/cli/commands/report/stats-calculator.test.ts AND site/tests/server/aggregates-phase2.test.ts. Drift in either implementation will fail the other side's test.
